top_signals.title: Trump Call for Crop Sales to Iran Adds Cautious Hope for Farmers
top_signals.summary: President Donald Trump on Tuesday reiterated that funds from any unfrozen Iranian assets would be used in part for grain shipments, potentially providing a fresh market for American farmers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Japan shipping industry sees safety as key to Hormuz navigation
top_signals.summary: All ships will likely resume navigation once hostilities have fully ended and details of mine removal operations are confirmed, Nippon Yusen chair Hitoshi Nagasawa added.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
